LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Approved.stages.0.descriptio: I was in a sea vessel. I loved it.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Approved.stages.0.label: sailed in a sea vessel
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Horrible.stages.0.descriptio: I was in a sailing vehicle. It was horrible
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Horrible.stages.0.label: sailed in a sea vessel
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.0.descriptio: It has been a lil while since I've ridden the waves.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.0.label: sirens' call (more than 1 day)
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.1.descriptio: I need to sail, I'm getting very antsy.
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.1.label: sirens' call (more than 5 days)
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.2.descriptio: Enough is enough, I'm feeling the call of the open seas! I want to sail!
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.2.label: sirens' call (more than 10 days)
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.3.descriptio: I AM THE MASTER OF MY FATE! I AM THE CAPTAIN OF MY SOUL! I MUST SAIL THE SEAS!
LanguageData.VVE_Sailing_Required.stages.3.label: sirens' call (more than 20 days)
